document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Eastern Passage/Cow Bay

permitted_uses.use_name: Scientific study and education, involving no buildings
Uses accessory to the foregoing uses

provisions.text: PA USES PERMITTED No development permit shall be issued in any PA (Protected Area) Zone except for the following:

PA ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any PA Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area: 930m2 Minimum Frontage: 30.5m Minimum Front or Flankage Yard: 20m Minimum Side or Rear Yard: 20m

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: GRADE ALTERATION AND VEGETATION

provisions.text: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: GRADE ALTERATION AND VEGETATION REMOVAL Within any PA zone, no infilling, excavation, alteration of grade or removal of vegetation shall be permitted. The construction of board walks, walkways or trails shall be permitted provided that no infilling or alteration of grade occurs other than the placement of piles or the placement of trails on top of the existing grade.

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 24C.3 OTHER REQUIREMENTS: GRADE ALTERATION AND VEGETATION

content_blocks.text: Within any PA zone, no infilling, excavation, alteration of grade or removal of vegetation shall be permitted. The construction of board walks, walkways or trails shall be permitted provided that no infilling or alteration of grade occurs other than the placement of piles or the placement of trails on top of the existing grade.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
